title: nassella formicarum
intro: Nassella formicarum, also known as Needle and Thread or Needle Grass, is a perennial grass native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Nassella formicarum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and easing respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Nassella formicarum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
